tasks.title: Add user authentication
tasks.description:
Add login/logout endpoints to the API.

Acceptance:
- POST /login with {username, password} returns a JWT token
- GET /me with Authorization header returns user info
- Invalid credentials return 401
- No changes to existing endpoints

tasks.title: Write auth integration tests
tasks.description:
Test the auth endpoints added in T001.

Acceptance:
- Tests hit a real database (not mocks)
- Cover: successful login, wrong password, expired token, /me without token
- All tests pass
